accept: README's storage description matches the act-f048 outcome (separate-repo model and code-canonical / act-overlay framing reflected).
Getting Started instructions still work end-to-end against the new model (act init either still bootstraps the code repo correctly or has updated equivalent instructions).
Sample-session block still reflects reality (commit-marker pattern preserved or revised per the new model).
payload.description: The README currently describes act state as living in '.act/' inside the code repo. Under the act-f048 nested-repo / coordination-plane reframe, that's no longer accurate — act state moves into a separate (often nested) repo, with code commits as the canonical record and act state as overlay. Refresh the 'Why this exists' paragraph and any other affected wording once act-f048 lands and its data model is settled.
payload.title: Refresh README storage description after act-f048 (nested-repo / coordination-plane) lands
